Author: Crystal Job Rank contributors
Name: Crystal Job Rank
Punchline: Post-match CC stats and a separate rating for every job.
Description: Records Crystalline Conflict result screens, keeps local match history and calculates a transparent win/loss-only rating for each job. Use /cjr.
Changelog: Rating tiers now begin with Bronze at the initial 1500 rating, followed by Silver 1600, Gold 1700, Platinum 1800, Diamond 1900, and Crystal 2000.
